core_mechanism: punctuated-equilibrium / tipping-point dynamics in a coupled multi-unit system: states drift slowly under endogenous accumulation but exogenous shocks push the system across a threshold, triggering rapid, synchronized regime shifts across many coupled units at once, alongside a drift from a monocentric toward a polycentric influence structure
brief_reason: The abstract contrasts slow cumulative intrinsic change with exogenous shocks (Chernobyl, 9/11, COVID-19) that produce rapid disruptions synchronously reconfiguring many countries' priorities at once, and a reorganization of influence toward a polycentric structure with new emerging hubs.
